pattern: Observe that after at most n-1 rounds the global maximum skill must be at the front; simulate with a win counter and short-circuit when k >= n.
hints: The player with the highest skill will eventually win every game they play; if k >= n-1, the answer is simply the index of the maximum skill.
Simulate the queue: maintain the current champion (front player) and count consecutive wins; when a newcomer beats them, reset the win count.
Once any player accumulates k consecutive wins, return their original index immediately.

edge_inputs.description: k equals n-1, max player wins
two players, k larger than n so global max wins
max is at the end, player 0 wins first k-1 games but max ends rotation
k larger than n, global max always wins
player 0 starts strong but loses eventually

stress.description: random distinct skills with moderate k
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = min(size, 1000)
    skills = rng.sample(range(1, n + 1), n)
    k = rng.randint(1, n)
    return [skills, k]

oracle_python:
class Solution:
    def findWinningPlayer(self, skills, k):
        n = len(skills)
        # Once the global maximum reaches the front, it wins every subsequent game
        # so if k >= n we can short-circuit. We simulate until done or n-1 games pass.
        max_idx = skills.index(max(skills))
        from collections import deque
        q = deque(range(n))
        champion = q[0]
        wins = 0
        games = 0
        while wins < k:
            a = q.popleft()
            b = q.popleft()
            if skills[a] > skills[b]:
                winner, loser = a, b
            else:
                winner, loser = b, a
            q.appendleft(winner)
            q.append(loser)
            games += 1
            if winner == champion:
                wins += 1
            else:
                champion = winner
                wins = 1
            # If the global max is now champion and k >= remaining needed, done
            if champion == max_idx and k >= n:
                return champion
        return champion
